virtualTable.name: sqlview_layer_id
virtualTable.sql:
WITH authorized_area AS (
SELECT
ra.geom AS area_geom,
rl.area_ignore_flag,
acl.id
FROM
db_mst_schema.mst_app_client_list acl
INNER JOIN db_mst_schema.mst_authorization_member am
ON acl.id = am.authorization_client_id
INNER JOIN db_mst_schema.mst_authorization_group ag
ON am.authorization_group_id = ag.authorization_group_id
INNER JOIN db_mst_schema.mst_referenceable_layer_facility rl
ON ag.authorization_group_id = rl.authorization_group_id
INNER JOIN db_mst_schema.mst_reference_area ra
ON ag.area_id = ra.area_id
WHERE
acl.client_id = '%client_id%'
AND rl.layer_id = 'sqlview_layer_id'
)
SELECT
mv.*
FROM
db_mv_2d_schema.sqlview_layer_id mv
CROSS JOIN authorized_area
WHERE
CASE
WHEN authorized_area.area_ignore_flag = '1' THEN TRUE
WHEN authorized_area.area_ignore_flag = '0' THEN
mv.geom && authorized_area.area_geom
AND ST_Intersects(mv.geom, authorized_area.area_geom)
ELSE FALSE
END
